recentArticles.title: Kanye West Settles Another Copyright Lawsuit Days Before New Album Drops - Forbes
recentArticles.snippet: Our best stories, exclusive reporting and Forbes perspectives on the day’s top news. Kanye West Settles Another Copyright Lawsuit Days Before New Album Drops. # Kanye West Settles Another Copyright Lawsuit Days Before New Album Drops. Kanye West reached a settlement agreement in a lawsuit filed by Memphis rappers who accused him of “blatant” copyright infringement for sampling their song without permission, days before West is slated to drop his new album. Kanye West is due to release a new album next week. The rappers accused West and Ty Dolla $ign of “brazen” copyright infringement by using a sample of their song, “Drink a Yak (Part 2),” without permission on “Fuk Sumn,” a song West and Ty Dolla $ign released in 2024. Some of West’s latest music releases sparked accusations and lawsuits accusing the rapper of sampling copyrighted music without permission, including a high-profile lawsuit by Donna Summer’s estate, which was settled in May 2024.

recentArticles.title: Harry Styles’ new album is a massive chart success - The Public's Radio
recentArticles.snippet: # Harry Styles’ new album is a massive chart success. There’s been little doubt about which album was going to top this week’s *Billboard* 200, as Harry Styles — whose post-One Direction solo records have all debuted at No. 1 — was virtually guaranteed to put up blockbuster numbers for *Kiss All the Time. Even compared to lofty expectations, Styles has to be pleased with the new album’s performance, as it racked up 430,000 equivalent album units in its first week on the chart. With Harry Styles back atop the *Billboard* 200, last week’s blockbuster debut (Bruno Mars‘ first solo album since 2016, *The Romantic*) dips to No. 2. This week, *Albini Sessions (Benefit for Letters Charity)* debuts on the *Billboard* 200 at No. 197 — Fugazi’s first week on the chart since its last album, *The Argument*, came out in the fall of 2001.

recentArticles.title: DeleteMe acquires social media security tool Block Party - TechCrunch
recentArticles.snippet: # DeleteMe acquires social media security tool Block Party. Block Party founder Tracy Chou announced on Wednesday that the company has been acquired by DeleteMe, an online personal data removal service. A software engineer and advocate for diversity in tech, Chou founded Block Party in 2018 as a tool to help people stay safe from targeted harassment on Twitter, inspired by her own experiences on the platform. Under his ownership, the company began charging for access to its API, but the costs were too steep for a startup like Block Party to operate, so Block Party was forced to quickly pivot and launch tools for other platforms. ### Save up to $300 or 30% to TechCrunch Founder Summit. #### 1,000+ **founders** and investors come together at **TechCrunch Founder Summit 2026** for a full day focused on growth, execution, and real-world scaling. For current Block Party users, nothing will change for now — as the tool becomes more integrated into DeleteMe at large, the company says it will share more with customers.

recentArticles.snippet: # Jay-Z on refusing to settle sexual assault lawsuit: ‘I can’t do it, I would die’. Jay-Z has spoken out about his recent sexual assault lawsuit in a new interview. The suit alleged that Jay-Z and Sean “Diddy” Combs raped a a 13-year-old girl at a party in 2000. Combs and Jay-Z denied all allegations after the lawsuit was filed in late 2024, and the case was voluntarily dismissed in February 2025. “It was hard,” Jay-Z told GQ. Not even a: ‘I got to go to the board with this.’ It was like a testament because people know me.”. The lawsuit claimed that an unnamed girl was drugged and raped by both Jay-Z and Combs at a party after the MTV music awards in 2000. Jay-Z blasted the assault allegations when they first emerged in late 2024, calling them a “blackmail attempt”. “I don’t know if it’s helpful to our growth where the fallout lands, especially on social media,” the musician added.

In addition, the lineup features Kehlani, Brandy and T.I., Mariah the Scientist, a J.Period live mixtape set with Wale and Roots rapper Black Thought, DJ Jazzy Jeff’s Magnificent Block Party, Destin Conrad, KWN and a Jermaine Dupri and friends set. The opening night will be the first time Jay-Z has performed with the Roots in more than a decade. Speaking of the move to scenic Belmont Plateau, Roots manager and Live Nation Urban president Shawn Gee said in a statement, “Moving the Roots Picnic to Belmont Plateau and bringing Jay-Z and The Roots together to perform are both bucket-list moments for us. recentArticles.title: Jeff Klein Isn’t Selling San Vicente Bungalows — Unless It’s “F*** You” Money - The Hollywood Reporter
recentArticles.snippet: Is Jeff Klein looking to open a San Vicente Bungalow in Palm Springs? That was the question left open by *The Wall Street Journal*’s March 19 bombshell scoop — that Klein, 54, was working with Goldman Sachs and real-estate firm JLL to find a new investment partner for his high-end hospitality empire, long a magnet for A-list celebs and industry climbers, ostensibly as part of an expansion plan. Notably, though, the *Journal* also reported that Klein would “consider selling a majority or even all of the businesses,” including his West Hollywood and New York properties. Rambling Reporter gave Klein a call to clear up the confusion and learned that it’s definitely the former — unless, of course, the money ends up being stupid enough for it to be the latter. We are open to the right partner to help us grow, but not to compromise what makes it special,” says Klein, who these days is something of a Hollywood royal himself — as is his husband of nearly 15 years, John Goldwyn, grandson of Samuel.

recentArticles.title: Chinese Hit Satire ‘Johnny Keep Walking!’ to Get French Remake Through Master Movies (EXCLUSIVE) - Variety
recentArticles.snippet: French production company Master Movies has acquired the French remake rights for the 2023 Chinese comedy feature “Johnny Keep Walking!” The deal was struck with Chinese film company Tiger Pictures Entertainment and marks one of the rare instances of a mainland Chinese film getting a foreign language remake. “‘Johnny Keep Walking!’ represents a notable milestone for the Chinese film industry, as one of the few Chinese films to be remade for Western audiences, highlighting the growing international reach of Chinese storytelling,” said Owen Young, representative of Tiger Pictures Entertainment. “We’re thrilled to have acquired the French adaptation rights to ‘Johnny Keep Walking!,’ whose sharp and accurate take on corporate life struck us as both hilarious and insightful,” said Lola and Marco Pacchioni, directors of Master Movies, in a statement. Tiger Pictures described the deal as part of their corporate transition from its core business of international distribution of Chinese films, towards a broader strategy of international IP management and development. * ### Netflix Could Pay as Much as $600 Million for Ben Affleck’s AI Film Start-Up: Report.

recentArticles.snippet: BTS —RM, Jin, Suga, J‑hope, Jimin, V and Jung Kook — will make their first late-night appearance since 2021 with back-to-back episodes on “The Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon.”. Their visit will follow the release of their fifth studio album, “Arirang,” on Friday and the global live performance “BTS: The Comeback Live | Arirang,” streaming March 21 on Netflix. BTS last performed together on “The Tonight Show” during their BTS takeover in July 2021, although Jimin, Suga, Jung Kook, Jin and J‑hope have each appeared individually since then. recentArticles.title: Jay-Z on Kendrick-Drake Beef, Refusing to Settle Sexual Assault Lawsuit - Variety
recentArticles.snippet: # Jay-Z Says Kendrick-Drake Beef Went Too Far by ‘Bringing People’s Kids In,’ Explains Why He Refused to Settle Sexual Assault Lawsuit: ‘I Would Die’. Because even if 10 million people know some of these songs, there’s 120 million people that’re like, ‘What is he doing?’ As an artist, to stand up there and do it and complete your vision — I had to tip my hat. Well, I don’t know if you’re going to like it. Just everything around it was like, ‘Man, this is taking us a couple steps back.’ We’ve just grown so much that — I guess I’m going to say it — I don’t know if battling needs to be part of the culture anymore. Jay later added, “I realize it’s a bit hypocritical because of how many battles I’ve been in, and given the nature of ‘Super Ugly.’ It takes growth to arrive at this place, because I’ve done the bullshit too!”.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞內容主要關於Jay-Z對Kendrick-Drake紛爭的看法及其個人法律訴訟，與周杰倫無關。

recentArticles.title: Charlotte Cardin’s ‘The Way We Touch’ Debuts in the Top 50 on Billboard Canadian Hot 100 - Billboard Canada
recentArticles.snippet: As a well-known bilingual artist with hits in both of Canada's official languages, the song marks Cardin’s return to singing in English — her first since 2024’s **A Week in Nashville** EP. The song dropped the same week as his new global collaboration "Ranjha" with Sia and David Guetta, which debuted for the first time at Toronto Metropolitan University for students in the historic first course dedicated to a Punjabi artist in partnership with *Billboard Canada*. Scoring over five million monthly listeners, the Nanaimo, B.C.-native has expanded his streaming success onto the charts, notching multiple hits on the Billboard Canadian Hot 100, most recently with “You And Me,” his first-ever love song. The rise of streaming has allowed artists to go beyond their home country, exporting globally — Canada slots in as one of the top 10 countries exporting artists, known for francophone artists reaching audiences beyond Québec and diaspora-driven genres like Punjabi-Canadian music hitting a stride, led by artists like Karan Aujla.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞報導加拿大歌手Charlotte Cardin的歌曲在排行榜上的表現，以及其他加拿大藝術家的全球合作與串流成功，內容與周杰倫無關。

recentArticles.title: 12 Albums Out This Week You Should Listen to Now - Pitchfork
recentArticles.snippet: # 12 New Albums You Should Listen to Now: Grace Ives, Underscores, BTS, and More. Also stream new releases from CA7RIEL & Paco Amoroso and Anna Calvi. We first got a taste of Grace Ives’ new album *Girlfriend* last November, when she shared three singles (in her terminology, a “thringle”) and a blog post detailing her state of mind: “Stop dwelling. Her new album *U* builds the momentum of three killer singles and a year of teasing glitched-out, atmospheric pop with the confident kick of big-room EDM. Anna Calvi’s new EP swaggers out of the shadows with the gothic cabaret barnstormer “God’s Lonely Man,” Calvi’s wraithlike falsetto writhing around a gruff lead from Iggy Pop. The EP’s three remaining tracks also feature guest vocalists, namely Perfume Genius—on a Nick Cave and PJ Harvey-worthy cover of Bonnie “Prince” Billy’s “I See a Darkness”—Matt Berninger, and Laurie Anderson, who threads her deadpan into a choral spin of Kraftwerk’s “Computer Love” that somehow ends up sounding like a Lost Girls track. New Music Releases and Upcoming Albums in 2026.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞內容未提及周杰倫相關資訊，主要介紹了本週發行的多張新專輯及藝人。

recentArticles.title: Jay-Z Defends Billionaires: ‘Morality Is Not Defined By A Dollar Amount’ - Forbes
recentArticles.snippet: Jay-Z, the world’s wealthiest musician, pushed back on arguments that billionaires are inherently bad in a rare interview with GQ on Tuesday, saying it’s “like a cop-out” to link a person’s morality to the amount of money they have. Jay-Z, whom Forbes estimates is worth $2.8 billion, told GQ a person’s “morality is not defined by a dollar amount,” questioning: “If so, what is that dollar amount? When asked how he feels about the “public perception that all billionaires are bad,” Jay-Z said “people behave the way they want to behave—it’s not a dollar amount” and criticized the argument as a “cop-out.”. Jay-Z said critics of billionaires “demonize this group of folks without fixing the actual system that exists,” adding, “[Money] may enhance it or may cause you to act in a way. I don’t like that,” Jay-Z said, saying it was “like trying to tear down people’s lives.” He said his company chose Lamar to headline the Super Bowl because he was having a “monster year,” not to make a statement on the rap feud.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞報導主要關於美國饒舌歌手Jay-Z為億萬富翁辯護，認為道德與財富金額無關，內容與周杰倫無直接關聯。

recentArticles.title: Jay-Z Won't Apologize for Being a Billionaire - Business Insider
recentArticles.snippet: Billionaire rapper Jay-Z says his success isn't about "selling out." It's about getting paid. Then it was like: You're selling out because you're making money," Jay-Z said. Jay-Z was alluding to the leftist refrain that there's no such thing as a "good" billionaire, an idea that suggests amassing so much wealth requires exploiting other people's labor, and that hoarding it fuels inequality. Later in the interview, Jay-Z explicitly pushed back on this dichotomy, saying "people behave the way they want to behave" regardless of how much money they have. "With that success, I've done things with my reach that I wanted to do that was helpful for a lot of people," he continued, adding, "A person with more money can do more good. Jay-Z has since been joined on music's list of billionaires by his Roc Nation signee, Rihanna; his wife, Beyoncé; and his industry friend, Taylor Swift.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞資訊主要關於饒舌歌手Jay-Z為其億萬富翁身份辯護，強調成功並非「變節」，並表示財富可用於行善，與周杰倫（Jay Chou）無直接關聯，因此無法進行周杰倫相關的情緒分析。

recentArticles.title: Jay-Z Announces Third Yankee Stadium Show After First Two Sell Out: ‘Extra Innings’ - Billboard
recentArticles.snippet: # Jay-Z Announces Third Yankee Stadium Show After First Two Sell Out: ‘Extra Innings’. Due to the high demand, Jay-Z and Roc Nation announced on Tuesday (March 24) that there will be a third Yankee Stadium show set for July 12 after the first pair of shows quickly sold out. ### Jay-Z. “JAŸ-Z 30 SOLD OUT JAŸ-Z 25 SOLD OUT JUST ADDED JAŸ-Z Extra Innings on Sunday, July 12th Yankee Stadium On-Sale at 1pm ET Today Tuesday, March 24th,” Roc Nation wrote on X. The Brooklyn rap legend released the OG “Dead Presidents” on streaming services, launched a website, dropped vinyl of classic songs and changed his stage name to JAŸ-Z, which he had used around the *Reasonable Doubt* era, featuring an umlaut over the Y. Jay-Z previously took over Yankee Stadium in September 2010 with a pair of coheadlining shows with Eminem as part of their Home & Home Tourin NYC and Detroit. ### Want to know what everyone in the music business is talking about? Visit Billboard Pro for music business news.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞資訊是關於美國饒舌歌手Jay-Z宣布其演唱會加場並迅速售罄的消息，與周杰倫無關。

latestReport.daily_summary: 今日搜集到的新聞中，並無任何關於華語歌手周杰倫的報導或焦點事件。所有提及『Jay-Z』的新聞皆與美國饒舌歌手Jay-Z相關，內容涵蓋其演唱會、專輯、法律訴訟及個人言論等。因此，今日無周杰倫相關的精選摘要或重要事件可提供。
